Title: Expands collaborative drug therapy management by pharmacists
Summary: Expands collaborative drug therapy management by pharmacists; makes permanent certain provisions relating to authorizing pharmacists to perform collaborative drug therapy management with physicians in certain settings.
LawCode: Amd §6801-a, Ed L; amd §5, Chap 21 of 2011
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to expanding collaborative drug therapy management; and to amend chapter 21 of the laws of 2011 amending the education law relating to authorizing pharmacists to perform collaborative drug therapy management with physicians in certain settings, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
